channel.title: Do it yourself (DIY) on Paraguay4Life
channel.description: Recent content in Do it yourself (DIY) on Paraguay4Life
channel.copyright: © 2026 Paraguay4Life - a project by Fovebo LLC | Legal Notice · Privacy Policy

item.title: Clericó: the fruity classic for celebrations and summer evenings
item.author: info@paraguay4life.com (Paraguay4Life)
item.description: A glass of Clericó brings Paraguayan summer feeling into your home - fruity, refreshing and perfect for sociable evenings.

item.title: Dulce de Calabaza: The Sweet Pumpkin Classic from Paraguay
item.author: info@paraguay4life.com (Paraguay4Life)
item.description: Discover the traditional recipe for sweet pumpkin from Paraguay. An aromatic pumpkin dessert that is sweet, filling, and versatile to combine.

item.title: Día de los Enamorados in Paraguay: Recipe ideas for a romantic menu
item.author: info@paraguay4life.com (Paraguay4Life)
item.description: A romantic Valentine’s Day (Día de los Enamorados) in Paraguay: a suggested menu from Mbejú to maracuyá dessert, including tips for drinks, décor, and quick surprise ideas.

item.title: Mazamorra: A sweet traditional corn dessert from Paraguay
item.author: info@paraguay4life.com (Paraguay4Life)
item.description: Mazamorra is a classic Paraguayan corn-based dessert. Simple, filling, and deeply rooted in the country’s regional food culture.

item.title: Chipa Guasu: Paraguay’s moist corn cake with cheese
item.author: info@paraguay4life.com (Paraguay4Life)
item.description: Chipa Guasú is more than just a side dish - it’s a piece of Paraguayan lifestyle. Learn all about this traditional corn cake and how to make it easily at home.
